generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures cart motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorPositionSensor
]

instance HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorPositionSensor
]

instance HistoricalTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical time-series data stored in TimescaleDB including sensor readings and control commands"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted, HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatabaseService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia model from Model-Based Systems Engineering using Capella"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerization of DT services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-based time-series database)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Model-Based Systems Engineering (Arcadia models)"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models to eliminate residual swing"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements against simulations with threshold-based breach alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationMetricInsight, TrajectoryComparisonInsight, BreachAlertInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:provides MessageBrokerInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to historical time-series data for analysis"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard visualization of crane system data"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectories for crane movement planning"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation results for crane dynamics"
]

instance DeviationMetricInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation metrics from continuous validation for fault localization"
]

instance TrajectoryComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated trajectory comparisons for system adjustments"
]

instance BreachAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Threshold-based breach alerts from continuous validation"
]

instance MessageBrokerInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker status and communication insights"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart motor"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist motor"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at hoist end for lifting pucks"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for physical crane system"
]

instance PhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane physical system"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller, PowerSupplyUnit
]

instance DTSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single centralized DT system comprising six integrated service containers"
    base:contains DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for crane movement (e.g., trajectory paths) generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Simulation Service, sent via MQTT to the Control Application, which interfaces with the crane's motor controllers to execute movements."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization with real-time data logging and validation, where measurements are compared against simulations at the frequency of sensor data acquisition (no specific interval specified, but continuous operation)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via MQTT broker connecting Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI, and digital twin services (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation), all deployed on a single PC using Docker containers for non-Python components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), focusing on real-time monitoring, fault detection, and validation during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between real-time measurements and simulated trajectories; threshold breaches trigger dashboard alerts; model validation methods reused from prior research for verification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for all inter-service communication and physical-to-digital data exchange; Physical Crane Interface communicates with hardware controllers via serial/USB."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a single personal computer; Python services installed via pip; Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containerized using Docker Compose."
]
